Process.Name: Export Flow Map Event Layer to Feature Class

lineage.Process: ExportFeatures flow_map_state_%Effective_Year% N:\GIS23_74_Traffic_Monitoring_Support\Annual_Traffic_Flow\Annual_Data\Data_Traffic_2024\2024_Annual_Traffic_Data_Publication_Working.gdb\flow_map_state_2024_working # NOT_USE_ALIAS "HWYNUMB "HWYNUMB" true true false 3 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,HWYNUMB,0,3;ST_HWY_SFX "ST_HWY_SFX" true true false 2 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,ST_HWY_SFX,0,2;RDWY_ID "RDWY_ID" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,RDWY_ID,0,1;MLGE_TYP "MLGE_TYP" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,MLGE_TYP,0,1;OVLP_CD "OVLP_CD" true true false 1 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,OVLP_CD,0,1;MP "MP" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,MP,-1,-1;BEGMP "BEGMP" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,BEGMP,-1,-1;ENDMP "ENDMP" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,ENDMP,-1,-1;SITE_ID "SITE_ID" true true false 10 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,SITE_ID,0,10;AADT "AADT" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,AADT,-1,-1;AADT_RANGE "AADT_RANGE" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,AADT_RANGE,0,20;TRK_AADT "TRK_AADT" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,TRK_AADT,-1,-1;TRK_PCT "TRK_PCT" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,TRK_PCT,-1,-1;TRK_RANGE "TRK_RANGE" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,TRK_RANGE,0,20;CLASS_01 "CLASS_01" Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,PEAK_MUT,-1,-1;K_FACTOR "K_FACTOR" true true false 4 Float 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,K_FACTOR,-1,-1;D_FACTOR "D_FACTOR" true true "Q_ATR_EQUI" true true false 11 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,Q_ATR_EQUI,0,11;LOC_ERROR "LOC_ERROR" false true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,flow_map_state_%Effective_Year%,LOC_ERROR,0,50" #

Process.Name: Join HWYNAME Field to Flow Map Data

lineage.Process: JoinField N:\GIS23_74_Traffic_Monitoring_Support\Annual_Traffic_Flow\Annual_Data\Data_Traffic_2024\2024_Annual_Traffic_Data_Publication_Working.gdb\flow_map_state_2024_working LRM_KEY "Highway Network" LRM_KEY HWYNAME "Select transfer fields" #

ExportFeatures flow_map_state_2024_working N:\GIS23_74_Traffic_Monitoring_Support\Annual_Traffic_Flow\Annual_Data_Prep\2024\PRO\TrafficData_REVIEW.gdb\REVIEW_flowmap_state_2024 # NOT_USE_ALIAS attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.
